title: Trump threatens 50% tariff on China if it sends weapons to Iran. Potential tariffs would be staggering

title: Trump orders US Navy seek and interdict every ship that paid toll to Iran. No safe passage for illegal toll payers

title: US trucking costs highest since June 2022: $2.97/mile. Dry-van rate $2.50
